chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 875 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel. -.-.-. None present for the petitioner. Same was the position on last date of hearing and it was observed that the petitioner is not found at the address. By way of an indulgence, this petition is taken up for hearing since it pertains to the life and liberty of petitioner. Learned A.A.G has already filed statement alongwith comments on behalf of official respondents/police officials and respondent No.2 SSP Hyderabad has categorically stated that neither any of the police officials is involved in causing any harassment to the petitioner nor the police officials have sided with private respondents. The official respondents have also undertaken to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law if approached with such a request. This petition is disposed of in view of above observation and with direction to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioners with further directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and to provide protection to the petitioners if they are approached with such a request by the petitioner. JUDGE Ali Haider
